name: chr16q11_2_pericentric_satellite
description: Chromosome 16 pericentric q-arm heterochromatin block (16q11.2), composed of alpha-satellite, HSat2 and HSat3 classical satellite arrays. One of the three classical heterochromatin C-band regions (1q12, 9q12, 16q11.2) that show pericentric instability in ICF syndrome.

architecture.internal_structure: Mixed alpha-satellite + HSat2 + HSat3 blocks; smaller than chr1/chr9 pericentric blocks but architecturally similar.
